column1: I need to go to the shop to buy … milk and … loaf of bread.
Yesterday she got … letter. The letter was from her mother.
I have … cat. … my cat is black and white.
There is … new collection of stamps in the shop, I’d like to buy it!
Ann and Mary are … friends of mine.
Mark broke his leg last weekend while riding … bicycle.
I wish I could buy … ticket to go to the sea right now.
Please give me … some water, I'm thirsty!
David has been dreaming about being … doctor since his childhood.
Please don't scream, I’ ve got … headache!
